title: dryopteris hornei
intro: Dryopteris hornei, also known as Horne's fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of China and parts of Southeast Asia. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Dryopteris hornei include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or tea for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
